_comment: Costing MCP-style CapEx cache for 4th & Madison (demo fixture). Shape mirrors costing.mcp.soapbox.build tool responses (RSMeans-class unit-cost basis, region-adjusted) -- NOT redistributing real RSMeans data, figures are invented/rounded for the demo per the soapbox-costing-plugin's NREL->NLR rebrand and non-redistribution note.
region: Metro City (fictional; region cost index 1.00 assumed for demo)

results.measure_name: Envelope Upgrade -- low-e glazing film + perimeter air sealing
results.unit_cost_basis: $/m2 of treated curtain wall + perimeter linear ft air sealing

results.measure_name: Chiller Plant Upgrade -- high-efficiency VFD water-cooled chiller
Central Plant Heat Pump Electrification -- air-to-water ASHP replacing hydronic furnace
results.unit_cost_basis: $/ton installed, air-to-water air-source heat pump plant + electrical service upgrade allowance
$/plant installed, central heat-pump water heater, retains existing distribution
$/m2 common-area LED conversion + BAS integration allowance; subscription billed separately (not capitalized)

results.measure_name: Rooftop Solar PV (500 kWp, VNM net metering)
results.unit_cost_basis: $/Wdc installed, rooftop-mounted array + inverters + VNM interconnection allowance
